title: Ender texture pack
description: texture pack that gives an end style but still keeping that Minecraft vanilla style.
body:
A textoure pack that gives tools and other pvp stuff a new vanilla like ender style!
I drew this myself on my ipad so i hope ou enjoy it!Various stuff like elytras tools totems and even the bow are redrawn in an ender style.You can choose which tools become an ender style from stone to netherite tools.
